title: The cost of becoming a god.
alternativeTitles: Why the strongest mages are empty.
She traded her memory for magic.
Was the power worth the cost?
The tragedy of being a mage.
Would you lose yourself for power?
The silent debt of a mage.
Why you should never seek magic.
What remains when magic takes all?
description: A mage discovers that the ultimate price for absolute power is the erasure of the very person she fought to protect. Is greatness truly worth the loss of your own identity? Follow for more dark fantasy stories.
